name: Senolytics coverage repair pass

scope.question: Can the senolytics track be expanded from a scaffold into an auditable evidence slice across preclinical, human, review, and trial-watch evidence?

summary: Added verified PubMed and ClinicalTrials.gov source records, study records, finding records, outcome/result records, risk-of-bias records, eligibility decisions, and a new coverage assessment for the senolytics track. Claims were kept conservative pending endpoint-level extraction and human review.

search_log.summary: Verified article titles, venues, publication dates, DOIs, PMIDs, and PMCID availability for the selected senolytics sources.

search_log.query: NCT metadata check for active or relevant senolytics trials
search_log.summary: Verified active trial-watch status and no posted results for NCT06133634 and checked registry metadata for other D+Q and fisetin trials.
Verified SToMP-AD active-not-recruiting status, phase 2 classification, estimated enrollment, and no posted results.

excluded_sources.title: Alleviation by Fisetin of Frailty, Inflammation, and Related Measures in Older Women
excluded_sources.reason: Relevant trial-watch candidate, but deferred to a broader registry surveillance pass so this repair stayed focused on one complete vertical slice.

excluded_sources.title: Alleviation by Fisetin of Frailty, Inflammation, and Related Measures in Older Adults
excluded_sources.reason: Relevant trial-watch candidate, but deferred to the next registry surveillance pass.
